title: data-tw regime-pack
description:
Output of `pack.py --pack regime-pack`. Macro-only fetch — NO ticker dimension. 4 sources (CBC + DGBAS + NDC + statgov; UNLIKE data-us, NO FRED). Drives `analysis-macro-regime` for the TW Investment Clock mapping.

IMPORTANT — NDC cycle signal score IS NOT 1–9. It is the **9-component composite score** (`景氣對策信號綜合分數`) summed from 9 sub-indicators, each scored 1–5 → composite range 9–45. The five-color light (signal-color: 紅 / 黃紅 / 綠 / 黃藍 / 藍) is derived bands on this composite, NOT the score itself. Do NOT compare this against a 1–9 scale used by some popular charts. Source: NDC `景氣指標與燈號.csv` direct parse.

_partial.description: True iff any leaf carries _error. All 4 sources are Tier A here so any failure flips this flag.

signal.description: Tier A. _action='signal'. data contains both score (景氣對策信號綜合分數, 9–45 composite) and color (五色燈號 string), each as a {observations, latest, prior, direction, count, ...} time-series block.

pmi.description: Tier A. _action='pmi'. Bundle: pmi-mfg + pmi-nmi (CIER via data.gov.tw 6100; separate from the NDC business-cycle ZIP).

series.description: T2 canonical flat alias per ADR-0002. Indicator-keyed dict of [floats] (chronological values). analysis-macro-regime / regime_compose.resolve_series reads this.
